response.justification: Bogdan demonstrates extensive experience with distributed systems, telemetry, and performance optimization, but lacks direct experience with experimentation platforms, feature flagging, or AI-first growth systems. His background in high-scale microservices and AI-agent infrastructure is promising, though his focus has been more on general software development than growth experimentation.
strengths: Strong background in distributed systems and high-performance services (e.g., 1M+ HTTP requests/sec at Dunnhumby)
Experience with telemetry, metrics, and performance optimization in production environments
Proven technical leadership and hands-on coding (e.g., AI-agent infrastructure, MCP code generators)
concerns: No documented experience with experimentation platforms or feature flagging systems
Limited exposure to statistical methods for A/B testing or bias detection in growth systems
Career focus leans toward general software development rather than growth/measurement platforms
